title: AGV K5 S Urban TC-3

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The AGV K5 S Urban TC-3 represents a significant evolution in lightweight motorcycle helmet engineering, utilizing an advanced carbon fiber composite shell that reduces overall mass by approximately 20% compared to traditional fiberglass counterparts. This reduction in weight directly correlates to reduced neck fatigue during extended rides while maintaining superior impact absorption characteristics through the multi-density EPS liner system. The integration of the TC-3 (Thermal Control) technology features a specialized internal lining designed to regulate temperature, actively dissipating heat in summer conditions and retaining warmth in colder environments without compromising breathability.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect balance of urban agility and high-performance protection with the AGV K5 S Urban TC-3. Designed for the modern rider who navigates city streets as well as open highways, this helmet offers a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while providing an exceptionally comfortable fit thanks to its precision-molded carbon shell. The innovative magnetic quick-release strap system ensures you can secure your gear in seconds, adding a touch of convenience and style to your daily commute.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the AGV K5 S Urban TC-3: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet with ECE 22.06 certification, thermal control technology, and optimized aerodynamics for urban riders.
